{{Quote|I say we get started on butchering that ''shatual'' if Rav hasn't already prepared it, ''Mer'ika''. Perfect celebratory meal, if we had the whole clan here.|[[Kal Skirata|Kal]] and [[Mereel Skirata]]|<ref name="TC" />}}
A '''''shatual''''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of animal [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. ''Shatuals'' were large creatures that made their homes<ref name="TC" /> in Mandalore's [[veshok]] [[Tree/Legends|forests]]. [[Gender/Legends|Male]] ''shatuals'', known as bucks, elicited a call consisting of a rhythmic bark when seeking to mate with a female ''shatual'', known as a doe.<ref name="O66" /> An adult ''shatual''{{'s}} size easily overshadowed one of their main predators, the [[strill]], but a single strill was still capable of felling its larger prey on its own. A number of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] also enjoyed ''shatual'' meat,<ref name="TC" /> and it was not uncommon for a Mandalorian to hunt ''shatuals'' for food, sometimes with the aid of domesticated strills.<ref name="ImpCom501st">''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]''</ref> [[Roast shatual|Roasted ''shatual'']] haunch was considered an excellent way to celebrate a joyous event, such as the [[Reproduction/Legends|birth]] of a [[Youngling/Legends|child]].<ref name="TC" />

In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], sensing the approaching birth of [[Venku Skirata]], the strill known as [[Lord Mirdalan]] hunted a ''shatual'' near the [[Clan Skirata|Skirata clan]] home, [[Kyrimorut/Legends|Kyrimorut]], and returned with its body with the intent of providing for the baby. [[Walon Vau]]—the owner of the affectionately nicknamed "Mird"—and his associates found the display touching, and the ''shatual'' was prepared and roasted for the clan's consumption by [[Rav Bralor]], a close friend to the Skirata clan.<ref name="TC" /> Both Vau and Mird again hunted a ''shatual'' for a clan meal in the year [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], not long after the [[Declaration of a New Order|rise]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. By that time, the young Venku Skirata had been fashioned a number of simple toys from [[veshok wood]], one of them carved in the shape of a ''shatual''.<ref name="ImpCom501st" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''shatual'' was first introduced to the ''[[Star Wars]]'' universe by [[Author/Legends|author]] [[Karen Traviss]] in the third entry in her ''[[Republic Commando]]'' novel series, [[Republic Commando: True Colors|''True Colors'']], published [[October 30]], [[2007]].<ref name="TC" /> ''Shatuals'' were later mentioned, and its meat featured, in ''True Color''{{'s}} sequel novels, [[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel|''Order 66'']]<ref name="O66" /> and ''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]''.<ref name="ImpCom501st" />

*''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]''
